No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or schedule relates to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or schedule relates to hunger or food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or schedule relates to health or well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course explicitly centers on '教育願景及品質' and '提升教育品質', directly aligning with SDG 4's core objective of ensuring inclusive and equitable quality education.
evidence: 以教育願景及品質為中心
確保優質教育願景實現
提升教育品質的學養、能力

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or schedule relates to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or schedule relates to water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or schedule relates to energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course aims to develop students' '專業能力' and '學養與能力' to lead and manage institutions, directly contributing to skills for productive employment and decent work (Target 8.5).
evidence: 擁有帶領團隊與管理文教機構的學養與能力
培養領導發展與管理的專業能力

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course mentions '企業創新策略管理技術,' which, while not industrial, implies fostering innovation within educational management, tangentially relating to Target 9.5.
evidence: SSD企業創新策略管理技術

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or schedule relates to reducing inequalities.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or schedule relates to sustainable cities or communities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The course includes '卓越組織與永續經營,' directly linking to Target 12.6 by encouraging organizations to adopt sustainable practices and integrate sustainability.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or schedule relates to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or schedule relates to marine life or oceans.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or schedule relates to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course's core focus on '組織領導發展' and '有效管理精進' for '文教機構' directly contributes to building effective, accountable, and transparent institutions (Target 16.6).
evidence: 持續的組織領導發展與有效管理精進
解決文教機構經營管理實務課題

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course focuses on internal organizational leadership and team building, not external multi-stakeholder or international partnerships for broader SDG achievement.
